sours.name: Glow Up Can
sours.style: Inspired by a Southern classic, our Hummingbird Cake-inspired Sour Ale is a tropical cross between banana bread and pineapple-upside down cake with bursts of pineapple and pecans. Contains: Lactose & Pecans

sours.name: El Rayo 2026
sours.style: 2026 Special Annual Release: Aged in tequila barrels and then conditioned on lime, agave, orange, and sea salt. This margarita-style sour is one we look forward to all year!

sours.name: Taster Glass
sours.style: Featuring our hop logo on the front, and Charleston, SC on the back, this glass is perfect for sampling or sharing that big bottle of stout, fruited sour, or DIPA. It's very versatile. Holds 5oz plus head space. Available for shipping - just add a flat rate shipping item under the Shipping menu and specify an address under notes during check out.

sours.name: FM Brightside Hard Apple CIder
sours.style: New World style cider that strikes a refreshing balance between tart and sweet, with a hint of oak tannin adding complexity.

sours.name: Let's Get Stoned Stone Fruit Sour w/ Apricots, Peaches + Dates
sours.style: Kettle soured ale brewed with apricots, peaches, and date syrup. Tart, stone fruity, and refreshing.

sours.name: Just a Little Krush Tablebier
sours.style: A dry, delightful, and super crushable Tablebier dry-hopped with new age American Krush hops.  Notes of watermelon hard candies and limoncello seltzer water with a light funk from our house mixed fermentation blend.  Naturally carbonated with honey for a bright and spritzy mouthfeel.

sours.name: TO-GO | "You Miss 100% of the Shots You Don't Take - Wayne Gretzky" - Michael Scott
sours.style: One part Lavender Saison naturally soured by aging in red wine barrels for two years, plus three parts Blonde Ale naturally soured by aging in Chardonnay barrels for two years, blended and bottled, then naturally carbonated and aged for a further two years.

sours.name: TO-GO | I Love Lamp [ Pineapple Hefeweizen ]
sours.style: I Love Lamp is our classic German-style hefeweizen with an Evil Genius twist. We brew this beer with 2-Row, Wheat, and Munich malts, and hop it gently in the kettle with German hops. Once fermentation has completed we add just the right amount of pineapple, making it a truly unique beer that is at once intriguing and drinkable. The banana and clove notes naturally produced by our hefeweizen yeast are balanced out by refreshing pineapple, resulting in a delicious, easy-drinking treat.

sours.name: 04. Take My Strong Hand [ Kiwi Dragon Fruit Sour ]
sours.style: Our in-house not-too-sour beer closed with natural Kiwi and Dragonfruit flavor.

sours.name: 12. History Began On July 4, 1776. Everything Before That Was A Mistake [ Rocket Pop Blonde Ale ]
sours.style:
Blonde ale dosed with lime juice and cherry- and blue raspberry slushy syrup. It tastes like a melted rocket pop (And it's purple)!

REFERENCE SOURCE: PARKS & RECS; Quote from Ron Swanson

'Everything before 1776 is simply "a mistake." At least, that's according to the strict historical philosophy of Ron Swanson from Parks and Recreation. 

In the Swanson timeline, humanity's "real" history started the moment the 13 colonies declared independence from Great Britain and began the quest to become the greatest country on the planet."
